chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2903 of 2025 M/s Bagh-e-Ittehad Cooperative Housing Society Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections No.1 to 3. 2. For hearing of CMA 12903/25 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 30.09.2025 Mr. Ahmed Ali Gabol, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, Addl. A.G. Nazir Ahmed Abro, Assistant Registrar Cooperative Societies-I, Karachi. -.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the purpose of filing this petition has been served as the election schedule has been announced. Nazir Ahmed Abro, Assistant Registrar Cooperative Societies-I, Karachi, is present and confirms this fact. Therefore, this petition, along with listed application, is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge
